$schema_comment: Cross-platform fixtures for the fatigue-interaction confidence math (ADR-0005). Loaded by Swift FatigueInteractionCrossValidationTests.swift and TS fatigue-interaction_test.ts. Both implementations must produce the expected values to within 1e-12. Path is referenced via the slice A11 commit; see docs/agents/domain.md if new fixture types land here.

fixtures.name: cycle-7-single-obs-guard
fixtures.comment: 1 observation fails the recent.length >= 2 guard → consistencyFactor=0; countFactor=0.5 (totalCount<15); confidence=0.

fixtures.name: cycle-8-zero-variance-exact-1-fixup
fixtures.comment: 2 identical observations → variance=0, stddev=0, clamped=1; Swift's `< 1e-12` exact-1 fixup snaps to 1.0 exactly.

fixtures.name: cycle-9a-mean-guard-fires-low-stddev
fixtures.comment: [0.0001, -0.0001] → mean=0; absMean=0.001 (guarded); stddev=1e-4; ratio=0.1; consistencyFactor=0.9. Pins the 0.001 guard denominator value.

fixtures.name: cycle-9b-clamp-to-zero-stddev-exceeds-absMean
fixtures.comment: [0.005, -0.005] → mean=0; absMean=0.001 (guarded); stddev=0.005; ratio=5; clamp(1-5)=0. Pins the lower-clamp behavior.

fixtures.name: cycle-10-11-countFactor-boundary-and-composition
fixtures.comment: [0.1, 0.2], totalCount=15: countFactor=1.0 (boundary inclusive ≥15); consistencyFactor=2/3 (1-stddev/absMean = 1-1/3); confidence=2/3 × 1.0 = 2/3. Pins both boundaries simultaneously.
